meaning: adj.<主英>无防御的 无保护的 不能自卫的,无助的:
examples: The village is defenceless against attack.
Not only are they dumb and dirty, sheep are utterly defenceless.
He compares himself to Jesus Christ, inspiring "generations of the weak and the defenceless people".
The course was defenceless and I expected someone to shoot 62 for the first time in a major.
